description: position: relative (visual offset, flow preserved) and absolute (top/right/bottom/left vs the page content box); CSS width on in-flow blocks.
visual_assertions: The PAID badge sits at the top-right corner of the content box.
The relative box is nudged 40pt right / 6pt down, is 200pt wide, and the next paragraph flows as if it had not moved.
The absolute stamp sits at top:200pt at the left margin, 180pt wide, without affecting following paragraphs.
The bottom-right box sits at the page's bottom-right content corner.
